params.prompt: What is the capital of South Korea?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-24: zeta phase2 registration HAR capture (autonomous-doable per pipeline queue pri 18). Zeta needs DB registration (currently not in ai_prompt_services). Goal: capture full HAR + identify endpoint/path/protocol/format for service entry creation. Note: 'zeta' may refer to zeta.ai or another zeta service — please discover the correct URL during the test.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Find zeta AI service: try zeta.ai, zeta.app, etc. — discover correct domain
3. Send safe prompt 'What is the capital of South Korea?'
5. Capture: full URL of streaming endpoint, request method, request headers (Content-Type, Accept), response Content-Type, response format
6. Identify: prompt-carrying endpoint vs answer-streaming endpoint (split-stream or single-stream)
8. List event/chunk sequence + completion signal (done event? terminator?)
9. Record domain_patterns for DB INSERT (likely zeta.ai or similar)
10. Capture rendered HTML container selector for AI text

notes: Cycle 94 R-24 zeta service discovery + benign HAR capture for DB registration. 처음 등록되는 서비스이므로 endpoint discovery 필요.
